heading: Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
label: 22908 Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)22908(a)36:3908(f)., , §§ 8(f), 15 (1st sentence), , 3448.Nov. 6, 1986Pub. L. 99–604100 Stat. 344722908(b)36:3914 (1st sentence).In subsection (a), the words “retain and”, “organized and”, and “the State of” are omitted as unnecessary.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)22908(a)36:3908(f)., , §§ 8(f), 15 (1st sentence), , 3448.Nov. 6, 1986Pub. L. 99–604100 Stat. 344722908(b)36:3914 (1st sentence).In subsection (a), the words “retain and”, “organized and”, and “the State of” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Corporate Status
children.label: a .—Corporate Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as a corporation incorporated under the laws of Ohio.

children.heading: .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.label: b .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
